
Catch Fits {data-navmenu="Fits to Data"}
=====================================

Row {.tabset}
-------------------------------------

### Landings

```{r catch_landings}
# Stocks as columns; one row per commercial fleet.
catch    <- mv$catch_fits
catch_fl <- catch[catch$fleet %in% comm_fleets, , drop = FALSE]
if (nrow(catch_fl) > 0) {
  has_catch_stock <- "stock" %in% names(catch_fl) && length(unique(catch_fl$stock)) > 1L
  catch_stocks    <- if (has_catch_stock) unique(catch_fl$stock) else NULL
  fc              <- mv_fleet_colours(fleet_names = comm_fleets)
  has_catch_q     <- "quarter" %in% names(catch_fl) && length(unique(catch_fl$quarter)) > 1L
  sok_fls         <- if (!is.null(meta$sok_fleet_names)) meta$sok_fleet_names else character(0)
  c_q_symbols     <- c("circle-open", "square-open", "diamond-open", "triangle-up-open",
                       "cross-open", "x-open", "pentagon-open", "hexagon-open",
                       "star-open", "hourglass-open", "bowtie-open", "asterisk-open")
  c_yr_ticks      <- sort(unique(catch_fl$year))

  # Returns list(p, n_traces, idx_single, idx_q_pred) so caller can attach toggle buttons.
  make_catch_panel <- function(fl, stk, panel_lbl) {
    sub          <- if (!is.null(stk)) catch_fl[catch_fl$fleet == fl & catch_fl$stock == stk, , drop = FALSE] else catch_fl[catch_fl$fleet == fl, , drop = FALSE]
    x_col        <- if (has_catch_q) "x_pos" else "year"
    quarters     <- if (has_catch_q) sort(unique(sub$quarter)) else 1L
    p            <- plot_ly()
    trace_cursor <- 0L
    idx_single   <- NA_integer_
    idx_q_pred   <- integer(0)

    # Single chronological pred line (visible by default).
    all_pred <- sub[!is.na(sub$pred), , drop = FALSE]
    all_pred <- all_pred[order(all_pred[[x_col]]), , drop = FALSE]
    if (nrow(all_pred) > 0) {
      p <- add_lines(p = p, x = all_pred[[x_col]], y = all_pred$pred,
        line = list(color = fc[fl], width = 2), showlegend = FALSE,
        visible = TRUE,
        hovertemplate = "Pred %{x:.2f}: %{y:.3g}<extra></extra>")
      idx_single   <- trace_cursor
      trace_cursor <- trace_cursor + 1L
    }

    # Per-quarter pred lines (hidden by default; toggled on when user switches).
    if (has_catch_q) {
      for (q in quarters) {
        q_sub    <- sub[sub$quarter == q, , drop = FALSE]
        pred_sub <- q_sub[!is.na(q_sub$pred), , drop = FALSE]
        if (nrow(pred_sub) > 0) {
          p <- add_lines(p = p, x = pred_sub[[x_col]], y = pred_sub$pred,
            line = list(color = fc[fl], width = 2), showlegend = FALSE,
            visible = FALSE,
            hovertemplate = paste0("Q", q, " Pred %{x:.2f}: %{y:.3g}<extra></extra>"))
          idx_q_pred   <- c(idx_q_pred, trace_cursor)
          trace_cursor <- trace_cursor + 1L
        }
      }
    }

    # Per-quarter obs markers (always visible).
    for (q in quarters) {
      q_sub   <- if (has_catch_q) sub[sub$quarter == q, , drop = FALSE] else sub
      q_pfx   <- if (has_catch_q) paste0("Q", q, " ") else ""
      obs_sub <- q_sub[!is.na(q_sub$obs) & q_sub$obs > 0, , drop = FALSE]
      if (nrow(obs_sub) > 0) {
        p <- add_markers(p = p, x = obs_sub[[x_col]], y = obs_sub$obs,
          marker = list(color = fc[fl], size = 5,
                        symbol = if (has_catch_q) c_q_symbols[(q - 1L) %% length(c_q_symbols) + 1L] else "circle-open",
                        line = list(color = fc[fl], width = 1.5)),
          showlegend = FALSE,
          hovertemplate = paste0(q_pfx, "Obs %{x:.2f}: %{y:.3g}<extra></extra>"))
        trace_cursor <- trace_cursor + 1L
      }
    }

    lay <- modelVis::mv_layout()
    lay$annotations <- list(mv_top_label(label = panel_lbl))
    lay$yaxis$title <- if (fl %in% sok_fls) "SOK catch (fish-equiv t)" else "Landings"
    if (has_catch_q) {
      lay$xaxis$tickmode <- "array"
      lay$xaxis$tickvals <- as.list(c_yr_ticks)
      lay$xaxis$ticktext <- as.list(as.character(c_yr_ticks))
    }

    list(
      p          = do.call(what = layout, args = c(list(p = p), lay)),
      n_traces   = trace_cursor,
      idx_single = idx_single,
      idx_q_pred = idx_q_pred
    )
  }

  # Attaches "Single line" / "Per quarter" toggle buttons to a subplot.
  # panel_results: list of make_catch_panel() return values.
  # offsets: list of integer offsets (0-based) for each panel's first trace in the subplot.
  add_line_toggle <- function(p, panel_results, offsets) {
    toggle_idxs <- unlist(mapply(function(res, off) {
      has_s <- !is.na(res$idx_single)
      n_q   <- length(res$idx_q_pred)
      if (has_s && n_q > 0) c(res$idx_single, res$idx_q_pred) + off else integer(0)
    }, panel_results, offsets, SIMPLIFY = FALSE))
    if (length(toggle_idxs) == 0L) return(p)

    vis_s <- unlist(lapply(panel_results, function(res) {
      n_q <- length(res$idx_q_pred)
      if (!is.na(res$idx_single) && n_q > 0) c(TRUE, rep(FALSE, n_q)) else integer(0)
    }))
    vis_q <- unlist(lapply(panel_results, function(res) {
      n_q <- length(res$idx_q_pred)
      if (!is.na(res$idx_single) && n_q > 0) c(FALSE, rep(TRUE, n_q)) else integer(0)
    }))

    layout(p, updatemenus = list(list(
      type      = "buttons",
      direction = "right",
      active    = 0L,
      x = 0.0, xanchor = "left", y = 1.08, yanchor = "bottom",
      pad = list(r = 6, t = 4),
      buttons = list(
        list(label = "Single line", method = "restyle",
             args = list(list(visible = as.list(vis_s)), as.list(toggle_idxs))),
        list(label = "Per quarter", method = "restyle",
             args = list(list(visible = as.list(vis_q)), as.list(toggle_idxs)))
      )
    )))
  }

  if (has_catch_stock) {
    all_results <- list()
    for (fl in comm_fleets)
      for (stk in catch_stocks)
        all_results[[length(all_results) + 1L]] <- make_catch_panel(
          fl, stk, if (length(comm_fleets) > 1L) paste(fl, stk, sep = " - ") else stk)
    p_out <- do.call(subplot, c(lapply(all_results, `[[`, "p"), list(
      nrows = length(comm_fleets), shareX = TRUE, shareY = FALSE,
      titleX = FALSE, titleY = TRUE, margin = 0.04
    )))
    if (has_catch_q) {
      counts  <- sapply(all_results, `[[`, "n_traces")
      offsets <- as.list(cumsum(c(0L, counts[-length(counts)])))
      p_out <- add_line_toggle(p_out, all_results, offsets)
    }
    p_out <- layout(p = p_out, xaxis = list(title = "Year"))
    modelVis::mv_config(p = p_out)
  } else {
    all_results <- lapply(comm_fleets, function(fl) make_catch_panel(fl, NULL, fl))
    p_out <- do.call(subplot, c(lapply(all_results, `[[`, "p"), list(
      nrows = length(all_results), shareX = TRUE, titleY = TRUE, margin = 0.04
    )))
    if (has_catch_q) {
      counts  <- sapply(all_results, `[[`, "n_traces")
      offsets <- as.list(cumsum(c(0L, counts[-length(counts)])))
      p_out <- add_line_toggle(p_out, all_results, offsets)
    }
    p_out <- layout(p = p_out, xaxis = list(title = "Year"))
    modelVis::mv_config(p = p_out)
  }
}
```

### Releases

```{r catch_releases, eval=has_disc && !is.null(mv$discard_fits)}
disc <- mv$discard_fits
disc_fl <- disc[disc$fleet %in% comm_fleets,
                , drop = FALSE]
if (nrow(disc_fl) > 0) {
  fc <- mv_fleet_colours(fleet_names = comm_fleets)
  plot_list <- list()
  for (fl in comm_fleets) {
    sub <- disc_fl[disc_fl$fleet == fl, , drop = FALSE]
    p <- plot_ly()

    pred_sub <- sub[!is.na(sub$pred), , drop = FALSE]
    if (nrow(pred_sub) > 0) {
      p <- add_lines(
        p = p,
        x = pred_sub$year, y = pred_sub$pred,
        line = list(color = fc[fl], width = 2),
        showlegend = FALSE,
        hovertemplate = paste0(
          fl, " Pred %{x}: %{y:.3g}<extra></extra>"
        )
      )
    }

    obs_sub <- sub[!is.na(sub$obs) & sub$obs > 0,
                   , drop = FALSE]
    if (nrow(obs_sub) > 0) {
      p <- add_markers(
        p = p,
        x = obs_sub$year, y = obs_sub$obs,
        marker = list(
          color = fc[fl], size = 5,
          line = list(color = "white", width = 0.5)
        ),
        showlegend = FALSE,
        hovertemplate = paste0(
          fl, " Obs %{x}: %{y:.3g}<extra></extra>"
        )
      )
    }

    lay <- modelVis::mv_layout()
    lay$annotations <- list(mv_top_label(label = fl))
    lay$yaxis$title <- "Releases"
    p <- do.call(
      what = layout, args = c(list(p = p), lay)
    )
    plot_list[[length(plot_list) + 1L]] <- p
  }

  p_out <- subplot(
    plot_list,
    nrows = length(plot_list),
    shareX = TRUE, titleY = TRUE,
    margin = 0.04
  )
  p_out <- layout(
    p = p_out, xaxis = list(title = "Year")
  )
  modelVis::mv_config(p = p_out)
}
```

### Observation Error

```{r obs_error_table, eval=!is.null(mv$obs_error) && is.data.frame(mv$obs_error) && "tau" %in% names(mv$obs_error)}
oe <- mv$obs_error
oe$tau <- round(x = oe$tau, digits = 4)
knitr::kable(
  x = oe,
  caption = "Estimated observation standard deviations",
  row.names = FALSE
)
```
